milon.tech

Made with ☀️ from Raanana

by @davidlevy

Your Heblish Israeli High Tech Kit
/
TERMS 0
CATEGORIES 0
Suggest Edit
JSON TOON llms.txt

Why do we need this glossary?

The Israeli high-tech scene is a unique ecosystem fueled by its own language: Heblish. It's a beautiful mix of English software engineering jargon seamlessly woven into everyday Hebrew grammar. Whether you're an Oleh Chadash, a junior dev fresh out of bootcamp, or an international partner trying to decode your Israeli team's Slack messages—this kit is your survival guide to speaking fluent Startup Nation.

Architecture & Infrastructure Heblish קל

Disk דיסק

Disk
Architecture & Infrastructure Native קל

Masach מסך

Screen
Architecture & Infrastructure Native קל

Mikledet מקלדת

Achbar עכבר

Mouse
Architecture & Infrastructure Native קל

Sharet שרת

Server

Tochna תוכנה

Software

Applikatzia אפליקציה

Application

To implement / To embed.
Engineering & Development Heblish בינוני

Bina Melachutit בינה מלאכותית

Artificial Intelligence (AI).
Engineering & Development Heblish מורכב

Vibe Coding וייב קודינג

Building apps by describing intent to AI
Engineering & Development Heblish מורכב

Prompt פרומפט

Instruction given to an AI
Engineering & Development Heblish מורכב

LLM אל-אל-אם

Large Language Model
Engineering & Development Heblish מורכב

Token טוקן

Basic unit of text for AI processing
Engineering & Development Heblish מורכב

Context קונטקסט

The information the AI considers for a response
Engineering & Development Native מורכב

Hazaya הזיה

When AI generates incorrect or nonsensical info
Engineering & Development Native מורכב

Sochen Bina Melachutit סוכן בינה מלאכותית

Autonomous AI entity (Agent)
Engineering & Development Native מורכב

Bina Melachutit Yotzeret בינה מלאכותית יוצרת

Generative AI
Engineering & Development Heblish מורכב

Fine-tuning פיין טיונינג

Adjusting a model on specific data
Engineering & Development Heblish מורכב

Zero-shot זירו שוט

AI performing a task without prior examples
Engineering & Development Native מורכב

Handasat Prompts הנדסת פרומפטים

Optimizing AI instructions
Engineering & Development Heblish מורכב

Copilot קופיילוט

AI coding assistant
Engineering & Development Heblish מורכב

Iteratzia איטרציה

Repeating a process to improve results
Engineering & Development Native מורכב

Zrima זרימה

The logical sequence of a process (Flow)
